title: Edit Fields Node returns 'undefined'
symptom: The Edit Fields Node is unable to parse a value, returning 'undefined' instead. This occurs even when the value is present in the input from a previous node.
applies_when: Input value is present but returns 'undefined'
not_this_if: Input value is missing or incorrectly referenced
root_cause: The issue arises when the Merge node is set to 'append' mode, which separates objects into arrays. This can lead to the Edit Fields Node being unable to correctly reference the input values, resulting in 'undefined' outputs.
fix_steps: Change the Merge node mode from 'append' to 'Combine'
Select 'Combine by position' in the Merge node settings
Re-run the workflow to check if the Edit Fields Node now receives the correct input
agent_instruction: Change the Merge node to 'Combine' mode and re-run the workflow.
